args.code: (() => { const title = document.title; const form = document.querySelector('form[action="/new"]'); const repoNameInput = document.querySelector('input[name="repository[name]"]'); const createBtn = [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].find(b => b.textContent && b.textContent.includes('Create repository')); return {title, formFound: !!form, repoNameFound: !!repoNameInput, createBtnFound: !!createBtn, createBtnText: createBtn ? createBtn.textContent.trim() : null}; })()
